song.title: Thou Art Fairer Than the Morning
song.author: Fanny J. Crosby
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C G Thou art fairer than the morning, .D D7 G O my Savior and my King! . C G Of Thy grandeur and Thy beauty, .D D7 G How my soul delights to sing.
[C] . C G Thou art fairer than the morning, . D Thou art brighter, brighter than the day; . G C At the glory of Thy presence .G D7 G Clouds and darkness flee away.
[V2] Clothed in light as with a garment, Crowned with majesty divine, Lo, the scepter of dominion Now and ever, Lord, is Thine.
[V3] O the greatness of Thy mercy, And the richness of Thy grace! O the love that in Thy kingdom Is preparing me a place!
[V4] When at last I reach the kingdom, Win the crown, the battle o’er, With ten thousand times ten thousand I shall sing forevermore.
